title: Phoenix, AZ
html: Stub. Arizona city. Surfaces in 2019 notes as the city Yahir was flying out of when he wrote the airplane goodbye letter to Alexandria — "You are currently on an airplane from Phoenix to Portland." Likely a family-visit waypoint; significance is as the city where Yahir met Alexandria, anchoring the Phoenix → Portland flight as the inflection point of the Alexandria arc.

related.label: Letter to self on a Phoenix→Portland flight, eve of school year
Two parts of the same thing gone — post-Alexandria one-liner
